narrative:
Swanton Swancreek (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,243 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.6%, a modest Republican lean of 4.1 percentage points.
